question: Which 3 customers have the most cancelled orders? Show name and cancelled count, highest first.

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT c.name, COUNT(*) AS cancelled_count FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY cancelled_count DESC, c.name LIMIT 3", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(*) AS cancelled_count FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY cancelled_count DESC, c.name LIMIT 3

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(*) AS cancelled_count FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY cancelled_count DESC, c.name LIMIT 3
